[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / createCamera

# Method: createCamera()

```ts
createCamera(): TextmodeCamera;
```

Create and activate a camera initialized from the current render camera state.

Useful for workflows where camera properties are mutated over time and
reapplied via [setCamera](setCamera.md).

## Returns

[`TextmodeCamera`](../../TextmodeCamera.md)

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="createCamera" encoded-code="-" />
